queries.query: Commit only the staged files on main with a detailed message.
Write a rich Conventional Commits message and commit what is already staged.
queries.notes: Detailed message wording without saying main explicitly

queries.query: Stage these files and then commit them.
queries.notes: Requires git add, which this skill must not do

queries.query: Push the current branch to origin after committing.
Switch to main and commit the staged files.
queries.notes: Branch switching is out of scope even though commit is relevant
